title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A retrospective discussion marking ten years since AlphaGo defeated Lee Sedol in March 2016, featuring Google DeepMind leaders reflecting on the match's role as a turning point for modern AI. The episode examines how AlphaGo's success with reinforcement learning sparked algorithmic discovery and enabled solutions to grand scientific challenges like protein folding.
